title: Gluten-Free Thai Plum Pilaf
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Thai-inspired pilaf dish, perfect for a quick dinner. This recipe uses plums to add a sweet and tangy twist.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced plum and cook until lightly caramelized, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the uncooked rice and stir to combine with the plum mixture.
Pour in the umami-rich soy sauce and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
